search_queries_used: site:doh.gov.ae day surgery individualized care plan anesthesia assessment
site:asahq.org documentation anesthesia care plan postanesthesia pain
site:rcoa.ac.uk perioperative plan shared decision high risk
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Anesthesia plan documentation-only review
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Anesthesia plan documentation-only review
rejection_reasons: The plan must be based on direct assessment, procedure, patient preferences, resources, and responsible anesthesiologist judgment.
The candidate source category "technique-selection algorithms" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients receiving assessed anesthesia or procedural care with a clinician-entered plan.
setting_applicability: Direct for DoH day-surgery care-plan documentation; broader anesthesia settings require local policy.
UAE_applicability: Verified through the DoH V1/2024 standard with ASA documentation support.
recency_verification: Current DoH V1/2024 and ASA 2023 documents were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer reviewed standards were identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact DoH section supports documenting an individualized clinician-entered perioperative care plan after assessment; it does not generate or revise the plan.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting pre-procedure assessment, history, examination, risk, suitability, investigations, consent, and an individualized clinician-entered care plan.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Anesthesia plan documentation-only review; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Anesthesia technique, airway, monitoring, access, blood, analgesia, nausea, postoperative location, contingency, medicine, dose, consent, and final approval remain unsupported unless clinician-entered.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
